actions.description: Sixteenth board meeting. Platform stable — 6 games, 10 clean QA cycles, zero bugs. R&D Frogger research done, needs pitch. UX/UI prefers-reduced-motion researched, needs design. Naming violations at 16, CEO escalation recommended.

nextStep: Next meeting: check R&D Frogger pitch, UX/UI reduced-motion design, naming violation resolution.
